title: SNC recognizes the passing of former board member, Mr. Lincoln T. Trigg, Sr.
summary: October 20, 2023 Sitnasuak Native Corporation recognizes the passing of former board member, Mr. Lincoln T. Trigg, Sr. who served on the SNC board of directors for over 15 years. First elected in 1983, Lincoln also served on Sitnasuak Land Committee and the Elders Committee. Lincoln spent many years...

title: New 2023 COVID vaccination available, offers best protection for upcoming season
summary: The fall 2023 COVID vaccine is now available! Everyone 6 months and older are eligible to receive this new shot. title: Meet a few folks who commit to protecting Alaska and supporting Trustees
summary: We want to introduce you to a few Trustees supporters who donate every month. Here, a few of these folks share in their own words what matters to them. Foraging for food is one of them! title: BSNC Shareholders Oliver and Wilson Hoogendorn Receive AFN’s Walter Soboleff “Warriors of Light” Award
summary: BSNC congratulates shareholders Oliver (Tusagvik) Hoogendorn and Wilson (Mungnak) Hoogendorn on receiving the Alaska Federation of Natives (AFN) Walter Soboleff “Warriors of Light” Award. title: BSNC Shareholder Etta Tall Receives AFN’s Della Keats “Healing Hands” Award
summary: BSNC congratulates shareholder Etta Tall on receiving the Alaska Federation of Natives (AFN) Della Keats “Healing Hands” Award for her work as a Tribal Healer. This award recognizes an Alaska Native who has demonstrated strong commitment, competence and sensitivity as a tribal healer or health care...

title: Innovators Hall of Fame 2024 – Now Accepting Nominations
summary: SCoR created the Alaska Innovators Hall of Fame in 2014 to celebrate and honor outstanding individuals and inventions that put Alaska on the map as leaders in innovation and to contribute to Alaska’s growing culture of ingenuity.
